title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Pizza Hut India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Pizza Hut India
jsonLd.description:
Pizza Hut India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Pizza Hut India:
Pizza Hut India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pizza Hut India!
